test_suite.details: node test.js: 3519 passed, 0 failed. Covers schema, HTML output, internal links, build pipeline, data cross-refs, sections.json schema, prose content, prediction panels, Phase A design refresh.

internal_anchors.details: Covered by test suite (3519/3519 pass). 12 tabs found; all showTab() calls match tab IDs. All 71 winNNN anchors present. Overview is active tab on page load.

tab_structure.details: 12 tabs: all have h1 headings. showTab() calls: 12 unique tab references, all resolve. sectionNav-style prev/next not used (modern tab structure). No orphaned tabs.

external_links.details: noaa.gov returns HTTP 403 on both attempts — likely sandbox anti-bot filtering (same pattern seen with PO.DAAC in prior runs). INTERMAGNET migrated from intermagnet.github.io to intermagnet.org — clean domain migration, content accessible. ESA Swarm URL path changed to FutureEO subpath — content still reachable. GitHub issues/new link redirects to login — expected for authenticated action.

data_prose_consistency.details: 71 WINs in wins.json. Covers 69 dome WIN numbers (V51.1); two dome WIN numbers have paired b-entries (057b, 058b). llms.txt correctly describes '69 dome WIN numbers' and '71 WIN entries'. All verdict counts consistent.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 71 winNNN anchors present in HTML. WIN ID format is win001...win071 (not detail-NNN). No missing summary table rows. Covered by test suite.

win_dome_alignment.details: Dome site (john09289.github.io/predictions/wins.html) has WIN-001 through WIN-069 (69 unique numbers). We cover all 69; our 71 entries include 057b and 058b sub-entries for paired claims. No missing or extra WIN numbers.

progressive_disclosure.details: 3 predictions still missing tldr field (PRED-R002, PRED-094, PRED-TESLA-002) — panels render without TLDR collapse. All tracked under open ISSs. 14 genuinely_prospective predictions; 0 missing tldr among those. No empty TLDRs in HTML. Structure counts stable.

theme_colors.details: 0 hardcoded light-theme colors in sections.json. Dark theme integrity maintained.

discoverability.details: All discoverability infrastructure present. Meta tags, og: tags, and ClaimReview JSON-LD all in <head>. llms.txt correctly describes 71 WIN entries / 69 dome WIN numbers.

expansion_tracker.details: next_id=294 > max_id=293 (OK). EXP-052 gap persists but is known (no open ISS — wontfix). 0 phantom tracker entries (output_file paths all valid). Expansion files matched correctly to tracker. 0 stale pending items.

section_queue_coupling.details: 0 coupled-category (section-new / category-proposal-writeup) items outside the priority queue. Clean.

workspace_sync_skips.details: 0 direction violations (no git-owned file written from workspace side). 135 mtime-guard skips across 7 paths — informational, normal decider/analyst activity keeping git version newer than FUSE.

curmudgeon_digest_coverage.details: 4 unprocessed reviews — all written 2026-05-06T18-22Z (yesterday evening), within normal pipeline lag. WIN-036.c4 has 3 minor holes (recommended_action: minor_edit). No filter regression detected.

broken_review_files.details: 0 broken review files. Digest errors[] empty after fresh regeneration.

drift_audit.details: drift-audit.json is 28.3h old (< 72h threshold) — skip refresh. 20 candidates queued for curmudgeon review. No verdict changes or large rewrites detected.

workspace_only_files.details: Same 2 stray files as 2026-05-06 report. WIN-067.c3.json.build.js is 0-byte (not real review data). EXP-202.json.bak is a backup, not real expansion output. Neither is at risk of data loss. Not tracked under open ISS.

build_reproducibility.details: Fresh build from git clone produces 4 diff lines vs published index.html — all in ds-meta date field (May 7, 2026 vs May 6, 2026). Same pattern as all prior runs. Date auto-refreshes on build. No data drift.

claude_md_mechanical.details: 5/5 spot-checked paths exist (data/wins.json, data/sections.json, monitor/prompts/structure-integrity.md, monitor/decisions/open-issues.json, build.js). 0 hardcoded counts detected in non-code context. Schedule table present.

issues_found.description: noaa.gov (https://www.noaa.gov/) returns HTTP 403 on both attempts. Sandbox anti-bot filtering suspected (same pattern as PO.DAAC/ISS-1860). Content still publicly accessible from browser.
issues_found.location: docs/index.html — outbound link to NOAA homepage
issues_found.suggested_fix: Verify noaa.gov is reachable from a browser. If so, this is a sandbox rate-limit false positive similar to ISS-1860. Consider flagging in llms.txt that link-checking from automated agents may yield false 403s.

issues_found.description: PRED-R002 missing tldr field in predictions.json — panel renders without TLDR disclosure.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Add tldr field to PRED-R002 entry.

issues_found.description: PRED-094 missing tldr field in predictions.json — panel renders without TLDR disclosure.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Add tldr field to PRED-094 entry.

issues_found.suggested_fix: Add tldr field to PRED-TESLA-002 entry.

issues_found.description: INTERMAGNET migrated domain: intermagnet.github.io now redirects to intermagnet.org. Content accessible.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Update href values to use https://intermagnet.org/ directly to avoid redirect hop.

issues_found.description: ESA Swarm URL path changed: /Observing_the_Earth/Swarm → /Observing_the_Earth/FutureEO/Swarm. Content still reachable.
WIN-067.c3.json.build.js (0-byte) and EXP-202.json.bak (22KB) exist only in FUSE workspace, not in git. Same files as 2026-05-06 report. Neither is real review data.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Can be deleted when FUSE write support allows. Not a data-loss risk.

issues_found.description: EXP-052 ID gap in expansion tracker — EXP-051 jumps to EXP-053.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Known wontfix — EXP-052 was skipped intentionally or lost in an early phase. No impact on current workflow.

summary: Test suite clean (3519/3519). Build reproducibility clean — 4 diff lines, all in the ds-meta date field (May 7 vs May 6, same pattern as prior runs). Internal anchors, tab structure, data-prose consistency, WIN detail panels, discoverability infrastructure, expansion tracker, workspace-sync, curmudgeon digest coverage, and CLAUDE.md mechanical checks all PASS. WARN items: noaa.gov returning HTTP 403 (likely sandbox anti-bot filtering, same class as ISS-1860/PO.DAAC, untracked — needs ISS); PRED-R002/PRED-094/PRED-TESLA-002 missing tldr fields (tracked under ISS-1857/1858/1859, persistent from prior runs); INTERMAGNET and ESA Swarm link redirects (minor, content accessible); two stray workspace files carry over from the 2026-05-06 report (WIN-067.c3.json.build.js 0-byte, EXP-202.json.bak 22KB, untracked). 4 curmudgeon reviews pending (WIN-002.c4, WIN-007.c3, WIN-036.c4, WIN-060.c5, all from yesterday evening — normal pipeline lag). Drift audit fresh at 28.3h with 20 candidates. No critical findings.
